message:
feat(store,command,runtime): implement multi-type Redis data support (bd-23uk)

Add comprehensive Hash, List, Set, Sorted Set, and HyperLogLog data types
to fr-store with full command dispatch in fr-command and error mapping in
fr-runtime. This transforms FrankenRedis from string-only to a multi-type
Redis-compatible data engine.

New operations by type:
- Hash: HSET, HGET, HDEL, HEXISTS, HLEN, HGETALL, HKEYS, HVALS, HMGET,
  HMSET, HINCRBY, HINCRBYFLOAT, HSETNX, HSTRLEN, HRANDFIELD (16 ops)
- List: LPUSH, RPUSH, LPOP, RPOP, LLEN, LRANGE, LINDEX, LSET, LPOS,
  LINSERT, LREM, RPOPLPUSH (12 ops)
- Set: SADD, SREM, SMEMBERS, SCARD, SISMEMBER, SINTER, SUNION, SDIFF,
  SPOP, SRANDMEMBER (10 ops)
- Sorted Set: ZADD, ZREM, ZSCORE, ZCARD, ZRANK, ZREVRANK, ZRANGE,
  ZREVRANGE, ZRANGEBYSCORE, ZREVRANGEBYSCORE, ZCOUNT, ZINCRBY, ZPOPMIN,
  ZPOPMAX, ZRANGEBYLEX, ZREVRANGEBYLEX, ZLEXCOUNT (17 ops)
- HyperLogLog: PFADD, PFCOUNT, PFMERGE (3 ops)
- String extensions: SETEX, PSETEX, GETDEL, GETRANGE, SETRANGE,
  INCRBYFLOAT, SETBIT, GETBIT, BITCOUNT, BITPOS (10 ops)

Bug fixes:
- SPOP now cleans up empty set keys (Redis semantics conformance)
- WRONGTYPE errors properly propagated through runtime error mapping

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
